features.name: Trip Management
features.description: Core functionality to create, edit, and delete trips.

features.name: Expense Tracking
features.description: Track expected and actual expenses for activities, stays, and meals.

features.name: Cloud Synchronization
features.description: Syncs local data with Firebase Firestore, supporting offline usage.

features.name: Authentication

features.name: PWA/Offline Mode
features.description: Service worker implementation for offline access.
